title: Valentines From An Uncertain Marksman
content:
I send you two kisses
         Wrapped up in a rhyme;
     From Love's warm abysses
     I send you two kisses;
     If one of them misses
         Please wait till next time,
     And I'll send you three kisses
         Wrapped up in a rhyme.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Arthur Macy, titled "Valentines From An Uncertain Marksman", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
